error: Post text truncated — content exceeded 3000 char limit
root_cause: No length validation before post. Agent assumed Notion draft was within limit.
fix: Added length check — split or truncate content exceeding 3000 chars before posting
lesson: Always validate LinkedIn post length against 3000 char limit before posting

error: Wrong image posted — outdated Google Drive link served stale version
root_cause: Used Google Drive image link instead of Notion page block signed URL
fix: Switched to sourcing images from Notion page blocks directly
lesson: Never use Google Drive links for LinkedIn images — they may be stale. Always pull from Notion page blocks

error: Alert never delivered — used --to instead of --target CLI flag
root_cause: OpenClaw CLI uses --target for recipient. --to fails silently with exit 0
fix: Always use --target not --to. Added to TOOLS.md and verified before running
lesson: CLI uses --target not --to — exit 0 does not mean success. Always verify actual delivery

error: Generated OAuth flow when direct API token already existed in config/notion.json
root_cause: Agent did not check service-registry.md and config directory before initiating Composio
fix: Added service credential check rule to SOUL.md and MEMORY.md
lesson: Always check config/ directory and service-registry.md before initiating OAuth. Direct credentials exist for Notion, Telegram, Gmail

error: Stacked two errors — wrong binding type schema applied to all bindings
root_cause: Zod union error messages were misleading. Bulk-overwrote bindings without understanding per-binding schema differences
fix: Added config edit safety rules: backup → edit → validate → re-lock chattr
lesson: Never bulk-overwrite config bindings without understanding each binding's required schema. Always backup and validate after editing openclaw.json

action: Schedule Ranger AI interview reminder via OpenClaw cron
error: OpenClaw cron tool crashed with TypeError before reading job payload
root_cause: Bug in cron tool internal code — not a schema issue
fix: Used system crontab instead. Direct curl to Telegram bot API in cron job
lesson: OpenClaw cron tool can fail silently. For critical one-shot reminders, system crontab is more reliable

error: Same post went out twice from auto-poster
root_cause: Double execution — not clear if race condition or duplicate Notion calendar entry
fix: Identified duplicate posts, user to delete one
lesson: Check for duplicate posts before celebrating success. Verify actual posted content, not just script logs

action: Tailored CV for Hitachi Energy - Head of Distribution Automation Global Delivery Centre
lesson: ATS-compliant single-column HTML CV written, converted to PDF via weasyprint (21KB). Key tailoring: greenfield PMO build at SGH, Talabat logistics/fulfillment scale (7M orders/day), cross-functional stakeholder alignment matching JD. Sent to Ahmed via Telegram (msg 40770). Also saved to data/cvs/.
